title: Add some obvious short options
body:
I chose to only add traditional ones like

--quiet, -q
and 
--user -u
And for some which could be specified multiple times I added 
-v, -e, -l

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat I added a --noheading switch and changed quiet to work the way you wanted.
